commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows `secrets apply` `.env` scrubbing to env vars associated with migrated targets and adds shared-value collision plus auth-profile regression tests.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +162. Total +180 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a high-confidence path: current main scrubs migrated values from all known secret env keys, while the PR head only passes env keys resolved from provider-id-bearing targets, leaving plugin/config targets with an empty allow-list.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair is appropriate because the remaining blocker is a concrete allow-list coverage bug in `src/secrets/apply.ts` plus focused regression coverage.
